# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind: AI Assistant Upgrades and Real-time Scoring Insights
- Summary: Showcase the latest AI assistant enhancements with problem-solving guidance, multi-model support, and real-time scoring insights to motivate efficient practice.
- Slug: codegrind-ai-assistant-and-analytics-overview
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-ai-assistant-and-analytics-overview
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-05-27-codegrind-ai-assistant-and-analytics-overview.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind now features enhanced Azure OpenAI-powered AI assistant with multiple model options, improved problem-solving guidance, and a revamped scoring system that highlights time, memory, and submission efficiency to help learners optimize their practice.
- CTA: Explore the updated AI assistant and try a guided problem with real-time feedback today.
- Visual brief: Short 15–20s video: screen-capture style showing the AI assistant panel in CodeGrind solving a sample problem, switching between GPT-4o and another model, with on-screen indicators for time, memory, and submissions. Overlay text: 'AI-assisted solving • Real-time scoring • Multi-model support' and brand colors.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
